Q3 Not checked
General Aptitude • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • Expert • +2 / -0
Not attempted

Three classes A, B and C take a class test.
The average score in class A is 83.
The average score in class B is 76.
The average score in class C is 85.
The average score of all students in classes A and B is 79.
The average score of all students in classes B and C is 81.
The average score for all the three classes is ______.

NAT
Correct answer: 81.50
Solution

81.50

(d)

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(b, c)

Q34 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

The root locus plot for a control system is shown in figure. The open loop transfer function corresponding to this plot is given by

 
Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
From the plot we can observe that one pole terminates at one zero at –1 and another pole terminates at another zero at –3 and remaining three poles are terminates at ∞.
Hence, option (d) is correct answer.
